purpose: Fail-closed audit binder for the runtime_math/policy_table.rs PCPT (`.pcpt` proof-carrying policy table) loader. Every contract surface — magic, schema/key/cell spec ids, header layout, required TLV catalogue, PolicyTableError variants, and negative-test inventory — must remain bound to current source code. Drift in any anchor blocks claim advancement at every replacement level until the audit is regenerated against fresh evidence.
verification_command: rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-membrane --lib runtime_math::policy_table::tests

schema_constants.rationale: MAGIC bytes anchor the wire format; any change must regenerate every consumer artifact.

Header layout (magic[8] + schema_version[2] + hash_alg[1] + key_spec_id[2] + cell_spec_id[2] + table_len[4] + table_bytes[4] + table_hash[32] + meta_hash[32] + reserved[32]) sums to 119; drift breaks every offline generator.
schema_version=1 is the only supported wire version; bumping it requires a new audit row.
key_spec_id=1 anchors the (api_family, mode, risk, budget, consistency) lookup key shape.
cell_spec_id=1 anchors the per-cell action/heal encoding shape.
Risk bucket count is a wire-format invariant.
Budget bucket count is a wire-format invariant.
Consistency bucket count is a wire-format invariant.

required_tlvs.name: build_info
required_tlvs.rationale: build_info TLV traceable to offline generator commit; required for audit reproducibility.

required_tlvs.name: proof_digest
required_tlvs.rationale: proof_digest TLV must be exactly 32 bytes; ties the artifact to its offline-synthesized proof.

required_tlvs.name: invariants
required_tlvs.rationale: invariants TLV records the static invariants the offline solver attested to.

required_negative_tests.rationale: Mutating MAGIC bytes must produce BadMagic, not silent acceptance.
Non-zero reserved bytes must be rejected so future format extensions cannot silently ride along.
Tampered table or meta payload must surface HashMismatch.
Strict-mode rows offering Repair actions must be rejected; otherwise hardened-only repair leaks into strict mode.
Risk-monotone invariant on each (mode, family) must be enforced at load time.
VerifiedPolicyTable construction must refuse to expose lookups when hashes do not validate.
